schema.ion.id › trade › commitment › v1

trade/commitment/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/commitment/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Trade sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

TradeCommitmentAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/commitment/v1#TradeCommitmentAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
lineIdalwaysUnique identifier for this commitment line within the contract. Assigned by BAP at select. Persists through the contract
resourceIdalwaysID of the resource being committed. References beckn:Resource.id from the catalog. For VARIANT resources, this is the sp
offerIdalwaysID of the offer under which this resource is being committed. References beckn:Offer.id from the catalog.
quantityalwaysQuantity of this resource being committed.
priceconditionalLocked price for this commitment line as agreed at select. Price is fixed at on_select and does not change unless a pric
customisationSelectionsconditionalBuyer's selections from customisationGroups for COMPOSED and WITH_EXTRAS resources. One entry per group selected.
specialInstructionsoptionalPer-line buyer note. e.g. "Extra crispy base", "No onion", "Gift wrap this item separately". Visible to seller at fulfil

Pack README

trade/commitment/v1

Per-line item — resource, offer, quantity, locked price, customisation selections, special instructions.

Attaches to

`beckn:Commitment.commitmentAttributes`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/commitment/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
